text:
apparent that both are records for the same beneficiary. It validates the BIC and returns a base BIC 
under which to house the record in the national claims history (NCH) databases. (All records for a 
beneficiary are stored under a single BIC.) 

NOTE: This field comes from the NCH category base BIC that is present on the first claim record included 
in the stay. 

SHORT NAME: EQ_BIC 

LONG NAME: EQTBL_BIC_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: A = Primary claimant 
B = Aged
